channel.title: Engineering at Anthropic
channel.description: Inside the team building reliable AI systems.

item.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Harness design for long-running application development
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Designing AI-resistant technical evaluations
item.description: What we learned from three iterations of a performance engineering take-home that Claude keeps beating.

item.title: Demystifying evals for AI agents
item.description: Demystifying evals for AI agents

item.title: Effective harnesses for long-running agents
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: Introducing advanced tool use on the Claude Developer Platform
item.description: Claude can now discover, learn, and execute tools dynamically to enable agents that take action in the real world. Here’s how.

item.title: Code execution with MCP: Building more efficient agents
item.description: Learn how code execution with the Model Context Protocol enables agents to handle more tools while using fewer tokens, reducing context overhead by up to 98.7%.

item.title: Beyond permission prompts: making Claude Code more secure and autonomous
item.description: Learn how Claude Code's new sandboxing feature protects developers with filesystem and network isolation, reducing permission prompts and increasing user safety.

item.title: Effective context engineering for AI agents
item.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

item.title: A postmortem of three recent issues
item.description: This is a technical report on three bugs that intermittently degraded responses from Claude. Below we explain what happened, why it took time to fix, and what we're changing.

item.title: Writing effective tools for agents — with agents
item.description: Writing effective tools for AI agents—using AI agents

item.title: Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop
item.description: Claude Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop

item.title: How we built our multi-agent research system
item.description: On the the engineering challenges and lessons learned from building Claude's Research system

item.title: Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding
item.description: Tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions.

item.title: The "think" tool: Enabling Claude to stop and think in complex tool use situations
item.description: A blog post for developers, describing a new method for complex tool-use situations

item.title: Raising the bar on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.5 Sonnet
item.description: Explore Claude's breakthrough performance on SWE-Bench, demonstrating advanced software engineering capabilities and code generation accuracy. Learn about our technical evaluation methods.

item.title: Building effective agents
item.description: Discover how Anthropic approaches the development of reliable AI agents. Learn about our research on agent capabilities, safety considerations, and technical framework for building trustworthy AI.

item.title: Introducing Contextual Retrieval
item.description: Explore how Anthropic enhances AI systems through advanced contextual retrieval methods. Learn about our approach to improving information access and relevance in large language models.
